context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 70 verified all requested features via code review and pytest. AUSTRALIAN_STATES dict has all 8 states with state-specific URLs. Report prompts use state_info.get() for dynamic URLs instead of hardcoded NSW. Quick Summary has 7 sections, Full Detailed has 15 sections (Client Brief is section 15), Extensive Log has 20 sections (Client Brief is section 20) with 7000-10000 word target. Context limits for extensive_log increased to total_doc_chars: 32000, per_doc_chars: 3200. Aggressive mode mentions 15+ sentencing cases and 20+ precedent cases. BarristerView mergeAllReports function combines all reports keeping longest section version and re-numbers sequentially. Cannot test actual report generation (would need LLM calls and reports to be generated).
